item.title: TIL CO2 is gay?
item.description: This was in the comments of a video of a plumber using a CO2 cartridge to clear a water line. Other things that are now gay because of CO2: Beer Fire extinguishers Dry Ice Human respiratory system

item.title: Just Browncoat Things
item.description: MV edit - so glad people enjoyed this - I did, too. Having written and published my own scifi stuff, I can respect how difficult it was to make Firefly work, and how heartbreaking it must have been to see it go away. You can see what I'm talking about with my work with this new audiobook I just released for free: https://imgur.com/gallery/FUgfb2u
item.dc:creator: inkican

item.title: Nazi-Punching School Teacher Regrets Nothing
item.description: Technically no evidence has been presented to confirm that she is, in fact, a Nazi-Punching School Teacher, but she wears the moniker with pride nonetheless. Sauce: https://www.bbc.com/news/world-europe-68143705
item.dc:creator: BorrisLegosi

item.title: Clementine the smol demands endless pets!!
item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: Not photoshopped, (description)
item.description: Agnes Denes who in 1982, planted a two-acre wheatfield on an empty landfill just two blocks from Wall street and close by to the then World Trade Center. Agnes along with two other assistants and a group of volunteers maintained the field for around four months before harvesting it in the summer. in the end the field produced around 1000 pounds of healthy golden wheat. Planting and harvesting a field of wheat on land then worth $4.5 billion created a powerful paradox. this piece of art symbolized a universal concept; it represented food, energy, commerce, world trade, and economics. referring to humanity’s mismanagement of world hunger, waste and environmental concerns.
item.dc:creator: alwaysbrushyourteeth

item.title: Dump my life into pieces
item.dc:creator: StrangeMax

item.title: Cold Weather Dump
item.description:
Monkey brain is gonna solve problems like monkey.
Low on dopamine get the pokeamine.
My mother and sister are both RNs and nursing stories are always entertaining.
Reject society. Go feral.
You're "what does this face mean" autism test won't work on me as I have had to memorise every facial expression and emotional response to survive for the last 30 years.
I just really related to this panel and had to save it on my phone.
"A well trained team of professional clowns could run this place more efficiently than you." Is a brutal and supreme insult.
Anyone else grow up on a farm? This is hilariously real.
I think stupid cat videos speak for themselves.
Spaniel jowls are precious.
..... package?
Do you know how much time and energy it takes to hide the fact that I am at best a semi domesticated goblin?!
I love new places and experiences as long as there are no expectations on me.
The word "embrace" is doing a lot of heavy lifting here.
Sounds like a panic at the disco song.
Polyamory: because you are too much work for one petson.
This is the best kind of absurd humor.
markmedownasscaredandhorny.gif
Just a bunch of silly little guys.
A pygmy goat headbutt-ed me into a large hole our dog dug in the yard when I was a young child.
The ... is a powerful force.
Never could keep a tamagotchi alive.
I am very good at entertaining drunk people in shuttle busses. This is a very specific and useless talent.
And I don't want the world to see me cuz I don't think that they'd understand.....
Your sarumom jokes.
Feel free to use dubious widget face to express doubt when necessary.
This is Whiskey trying to fit her whole self in my hand.
She's seen some shit.
Toe beans!
item.dc:creator: Jamceratops

item.title: ICM QUALITY MIX - Vol.07 THE BETTER TO SEE YOU WITH
item.description:
COVER ARTIST: Samuel Martin
ICM SUGGESTED TRACK: [ ▶ & SCROLL] I Love You - East of Underground YouTube: https://youtu.be/MoDzQujkFAU?si=p83BiJfzWDSKxDXa Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/7bbpg7SShcWLj1C8ABApb0?si=fa06c5c7c3444755

Samuel Martin
ICM Original / https://twitter.com/PathosMeta
Jeppe Mygh
Leo Long
Nkung Tran
Alexandre Arpentinier
Olya Anufrieva
Terry Wei
Magno Coutinho
Polina Shaman
Tatyana Kupriyanova
Meybis Ruiz
Haoyu Wang
Coco Kim
Suggested Track Playlists: (HIT SHUFFLE) YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLoIzKPbKfwniKOaadw-tB8kaEQiUQ1Yp4 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6cqV52puia81vNnPHxcz1W?si=yoUknxpQQVql9E-NZRQ4 *TOGGLE MATURE CONTENT IN SETTINGS TO VIEW OUR POSTS* ICM SQUAD: @vazquezdaniel, @ohvalleyofplenty, @nichoDriver, @Dirgekins, @onewallpaperaweek, @thedownlowe, @TheForbiddenSemicolon, @bagoffishstix, @JayKillBam, @majkongskull, @DingoJ0nes, @HandsomePenguin, @MrJwinkyface, @Gorgoror, @ciadmillefailte, @kaeldra, @DerpyVaz ICM TIP JAR: https://www.patreon.com/InterwebChexMix Just to let you know, in no way, shape, or form do we take credit for any random art, comics, or photos featured in this collection, only for the daily effort involved in comprising the collections themselves. Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. Cool, either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos
item.dc:creator: MetaPathos
